basics.name: Anand Bhaskaran
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Technical Lead | Startup Mentor | MBA | AI
basics.summary: AI-driven software engineer with 10+ years of experience architecting scalable systems. Successfully built LLM-powered applications for diverse use cases, achieving $337K in cost savings. Proven track record in mentoring engineers, optimizing microservices, and leading cross-functional teams to deliver innovative AI solutions that drive measurable business impact.

work.name: Beekeeper AG
work.summary: Technical Lead driving innovation in AI-powered features and system reliability, enhancing the usability of solutions for millions.
highlights: Architected Employee Referral System (99.99% SLA) — generated $1.5M+ revenue including $500K ARR
Built LLM-powered template translations using GitHub Actions and OpenAI APIs — translated 12K+ key-value pairs, saved $337K and accelerated go-to-market
Designed distributed templating engine serving 10M+ users — reduced setup time by 90%, powering 15% of all platform assets
Led GenAI demo template system for sales team — auto-generates customized content from Salesforce data, boosting demo speed and personalization
Spearheaded Search Platform Revamp — led teams of 2-4 engineers delivering scalable architecture for enhanced user engagement
Acting technical hiring manager for AI roles and deputy tech lead — mentored engineers while overseeing core module delivery
Drove cross-functional GTM initiatives — Seasonal Templates, Re-ignite Revenue, Sentiment Analysis, resulting in streamlined sales pipeline

work.name: Tenity
work.summary: Guided startups on technical strategy and scalability, enhancing their ability to innovate and grow within competitive markets.
highlights: Conducted thorough evaluations of emerging technologies for seed-to-VC startups
Advised multiple startups on technical hiring, AI adoption, and scalable solution development

work.name: Dronistics
work.summary: Founding engineer for an autonomous drone delivery platform that facilitated efficient last-mile logistics for various enterprises.
highlights: Built end-to-end autonomous drone delivery platform — architected full-stack solution (Vue/Java/PostgreSQL) powering 500+ successful deliveries
Delivered complete cloud infrastructure and DevOps pipeline — enabled scalable operations for enterprise partnerships with Unilever and CES showcase
Engineered real-time flight control APIs and logistics optimization algorithms — reduced delivery times by 40% while maintaining 99.5% safety record

work.name: EPFL — Laboratory of Intelligent Systems (Robogen)
work.summary: Led the development of an open-source platform for robotic evolution, enhancing the understanding of AI and robotics integration.
highlights: Led engineering of Robogen, an open-source platform for the co-evolution of robot morphologies and control systems
Spearheaded its migration to AWS, securing AWS Research Credits, and featured on the AWS Research Blog
Supervised 20+ master's students at EPFL in AI-based robotic systems

education.institution: Quantic School of Business and Technology

publications.name: Agentic AI: Simple ReAct Agent
publications.summary: Technical tutorial series introducing practical implementation of ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) agents, demonstrating how to build autonomous AI systems that combine reasoning capabilities with actionable decision-making for real-world applications.

publications.name: Microfrontends: Revolutionising Frontend Architecture
publications.summary: Technical deep-dive presentation demonstrating how microfrontend architecture enables scalable, team-autonomous development while reducing deployment complexity for enterprise applications.

publications.name: AI and creativity
publications.summary: Keynote presentation exploring the intersection of artificial intelligence and human creativity, demonstrating how AI can augment rather than replace creative processes in product development.

awards.title: TI India Analog Design Contest Winner

projects.name: PulseView - AI Market Intelligence
highlights: Built real-time stock market analysis platform using AI agents to generate and explain trading signals
Focus on explainable AI, speed, and clarity in financial analysis
Technical and news-based insights integrated for comprehensive market evaluation

projects.name: Proplab - AI Real Estate Tools
highlights: Designed MVP for a fully digitalized property inventory inspection system, enhancing operational efficiency
Leading development of AI-powered marketing assistant for automated listing creation across various marketplaces
Utilized AI technologies to improve property visibility and streamline workflows

projects.name: SwissNRI - Cross-border Fintech Platform
highlights: Launched first platform addressing cross-border financial challenges for Indian nationals in Switzerland
Led zero-to-one product development in 3 months, acquiring early users via strategic partnerships
Created solutions addressing critical regulatory requirements, driving user satisfaction by 40%

_jobApplication.jobDescription:
Are you looking for an opportunity to work on meaningful, cutting-edge projects in machine learning? Did you wonder what it would be like to work at a company where your contribution has a real, measurable impact – and you are rewarded for it?   

If you have a knack for data and aspire to contribute to ethical tech development, then this is the perfect role for you! We value autonomy, allowing you to bring your innovative ideas to fruition in an inclusive, feedback-oriented environment. Your work on AI agents and will directly contribute to advancing corporate responsibility through technology. 

Your Responsibilities 

As our new Senior AI Engineer, you will play a crucial role in developing state-of-the-art agentic systems and AI integrations within RepRisk’s Agentic delivery team. You will contribute to the design, implementation and operation of agentic and AI products within the company. Moreover, you will be: 

Designing and building agentic AI features that leverage memory, planning, and tool-use to solve real-world business problems.  

Developing, integrating, and maintaining LLM-powered microservices and pipelines as part of broader production applications.  

Fine-tuning foundation models and training custom models for perception, reasoning, and decision-making tasks.  

Identifying, testing, and implementing state-of-the-art advancements in LLMs and autonomous agent architectures (e.g., tool-use, reflection, multi-agent coordination).  

Ensuring robust performance through continuous evaluation, optimization, and A/B testing of AI components.  

Maintaining a well-balanced tech stack that prioritizes both simplicity and efficiency.  

Collaborating closely with product managers, designers, and domain experts to align technical solutions with user needs and business goals.  

Mentoring and guiding team members, fostering a collaborative engineering culture.  

Participating in technical design reviews and code reviews to uphold high engineering standards.  

Contributing actively to a cross-functional Scrum team, sharing insights and driving innovation from concept to deployment.  

Qualifications
You Offer 

A Master’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Engineering, Statistics, or a related STEM field (or equivalent practical experience).  

4+ years of hands-on experience as a Machine Learning Engineer, AI Engineer, or similar role in an industry setting. 

Proven experience in building or integrating agentic AI systems, such as autonomous agents, workflow automation, or reasoning-driven LLM applications.  

Expert-level Python skills and fluency with key ML/AI libraries (e.g., HuggingFace, LangChain, etc.). 

Hands-on experience fine-tuning, deploying, and monitoring LLMs in production environments.  

Practical experience building and managing scalable, data-driven microservices and pipelines. 

Strong grounding in software engineering best practices and clean, maintainable code.  

Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS or Azure), CI/CD workflows, and containerized environments. 

A proactive mindset with the initiative to drive ideas from concept to production independently and as a team leader.  

Effective mentorship skills and the ability to provide thoughtful, constructive feedback. 

A structured, analytical approach to problem-solving, with a focus on delivering practical and maintainable solutions.  

Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with professional fluency in English.
